commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pods -n yanxi-validation -o wide 2>&1 | grep sglang'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio logs -n yanxi-validation -l role=prefill --tail=30 2>&1 | tail -30'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio logs -n yanxi-validation -l role=decode --tail=30 2>&1 | tail -30'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio logs -n yanxi-validation -l app=sglang-disagg-lb --tail=30 2>&1 | tail -30'
